title: U.S. strikes Iran after 2 service members killed, 1 missing in attack on Jordan base
summary_full: The attacks mark the eighth consecutive day that U.S. forces have bombed Iran. The latest fatalities pushed the American military death toll from the conflict to 16.
summary_public: The attacks mark the eighth consecutive day that U.S. forces have bombed Iran. The latest fatalities pushed the American military death toll from the conflict to 16.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. strikes Iran after 2 service members killed
